release.name: SKStacks v2.8.0
release.body: v2 deploy stack: skrender (descriptor → deploy), k3d/Swarm/VM harness on RKE2, skbloom resumable installer (e2e proven), skred security loop, skwire v0.3.0.

commits.message: skstacks v2 deploy stack: skrender + harness + skbloom + skred
commits.author: Lumina

commits.message: v2 stack validation: OpenBao/Tuwunel/Windmill ratified; ingress → Gateway API
commits.author: Lumina

commits.message: coverage-matrix: 15 of 31 services verified live-proven on RKE2
commits.author: Lumina

commits.message: skdata: consolidate Postgres (pgvector + pg_search BM25 + Apache AGE) into one engine
commits.author: Lumina
